calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-21-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Athena Karsant, Plaintiff/Respondent
Edward Wong, Defendant/Appellant

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are affirmed.

Athena Karant testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced.
Exhibit 1: Blue Binder Full of Documents

Edward Wong testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced.
Exhibit A: Time-Line of Events, 2 Pages
Exhibit B: Rental Advertisement
Exhibit C: Letter
Exhibit D: Document from Consumer Affairs
Exhibit E: Photo of Blinds
Exhibit F: Letter
Exhibit G: Insurance Adjuster's Findings
Exhibit H: Contractor's Findings
Exhibit I: Copy of Security Deposit
Exhibit J: Public Records of Unlawful Detainer Complaints

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Katherine Feinstein, Clerks Melinka Jones, not reported. (210)
